summary: Implement a Profile Settings tab in the Settings page with profile fields and persistence via a Motoko canister update_profile method, using React Query mutations with optimistic updates, without changing other settings tabs.
architectural_notes: Do not modify Connections or Subscription tabs while implementing Profile Settings.
Profile updates are persisted via Motoko canister method update_profile.
Use React Query mutation with optimistic updates for profile saves.

existing_features.title: Replace the placeholder content in the Settings page “Profile” tab with a functional Profile Settings form that includes: (1) the caller’s current Principal ID displayed read-only, (2) an editable Display name text field, (3) a Timezone selector, (4) Notification preferences represented as toggle switches, and (5) a Save button.
Implement React Query data flow for Profile Settings: load existing profile settings, and save changes via a React Query mutation that performs optimistic updates and properly rolls back on error.
Do not modify the Settings page Connections tab or Subscription tab behavior/content while implementing the Profile tab changes.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement Profile Settings tab: show principal ID (read-only), edit display name, timezone selector, notification toggles, and Save button
Add/ensure Motoko canister method update_profile to persist profile settings changes
Use React Query mutation with optimistic updates for saving profile settings

Add a Motoko canister method named update_profile (if missing) that persists profile settings changes for the caller, including display name, timezone, and notification preferences, and ensure the frontend can call it.

projectName: Implement Profile Settings tab with canister-backed update_profile and optimistic saves
